creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 256337
Patch for oniguruma

Compile tested on FreeBSD 14.1-RELEASE (amd64) (make, make check-plist)

Poudriere testport OK 13.4-RELEASE (i386)
Poudriere testport OK 14.2-RELEASE (amd64)
